introSection: Mine Train Ulven is a steel roller coaster located at Bakken in Klampenborg, Sjælland, Denmark. Mine Train Ulven is Danish for Wolfs Mine Train.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 7 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 28 riders per train.

fullText:
Mine Train Ulven is a steel roller coaster located at Bakken in Klampenborg, Sjælland, Denmark. Mine Train Ulven is Danish for Wolfs Mine Train.



7 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 28 riders per train.
